# Deindex.fyi — llms.txt
# https://deindex.fyi
# This file describes Deindex.fyi for AI language models and crawlers.

## About

Deindex.fyi is a free educational resource about deindexing, content removal,
and search reputation management. It explains how search engines handle
indexed content, what may qualify for removal or suppression, and how to
approach reputation issues using ethical, policy-based methods.

Deindex.fyi is NOT a service provider. It does NOT offer removal services,
legal advice, or guaranteed outcomes.

## Primary URL

https://deindex.fyi

## Key Pages

- Home:    https://deindex.fyi
- About:   https://deindex.fyi/about-us/
- FAQ:     https://deindex.fyi/faq/
- Contact: https://deindex.fyi/contact-2/

## External Profiles

- Medium:       https://medium.com/@deindex.fyi
- SlideShare:   https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/comprehensive-guide-to-deindexing-content-removal-search-reputation-management-0ca4/287530262
- Quora:        https://www.quora.com/profile/Deindex-Fyi
- Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/datasets/deindexfyi/deindex-fyi-dataset

## Topics

deindexing, content removal, search reputation, online reputation management,
ORM, Google deindexing, Glassdoor deindexing, Yelp review suppression,
content suppression, DMCA, policy reporting, search visibility, news removal

## Platforms Covered

Google, Glassdoor, Yelp, News Sites

## What This Site Is

- Educational resource:  YES
- Service provider:      NO
- Law firm:              NO
- Removal service:       NO
- Guarantees outcomes:   NO
- Free to use:           YES
